title: Department Manager Vacancy at Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services:
Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services!
